name: SecurityLocalUnregisterApplicationProtocol
title: SecurityLocalUnregisterApplicationProtocol
description: Unregisters the reception of the application protocol with the specified User Defined Id. The node will no longer receive this application protocol and the callbacks OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolRxFinished or OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolTxFinished will also no longer be called. The call of SecurityLocalAllowNetworkWideRegistrations is a precondition for using this function.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
